vkSj lans; gksxk% Vksy Iyktk ¼Iyktkvksa½ dk voLFkku ¼pSust½ yackbZ ¼fd-eh-½ esa ftlds fy, 'kqYd lans; gS fd-eh-@pSust 370-420 ¼>Ttj ftys esa Mh?ky xkao ds ikl½ 38-280 fd-eh-@pSust 430-000 ¼jsokM+h ftys esa xax;kpk tkV xkao ds ikl½ 32-922 ¼12-453 fd-eh- yEcs fjokM+h ckbikl dks NksM+dj½ [iQk- la- Hkkjkjkizk@13013@658@11&12@lhvks@thlh jksgrd¼jksgrd&ckoy½ chvksVh] vyds’k ’kekZ] Lka;qDr lfpo 1136 GI/2014 (1) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF ROAD TRANSPORT AND HIGHWAYS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 13th March, 2014 S.O. 754(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 8A of the National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956) and the Supplementary Agreement dated 05.03.2014 entered between the Authority and the Concessionaire, the Central Government hereby makes following amendment in the Notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Road Transport and Highways bearing S.O. No. 835 (E), dated 26.03.2013, published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii), namely: (i) The Design Chainage of the End Point in Para 2, shall stand revised to km. 446.955 instead of km. 445.853. (ii) The net road section length referred to in Para 3 shall stand revised to 71.202 km instead of 70.100 km. (iii) Point 1 after Table 1 & 2 shall stand revised as under: The fee levied and collected hereunder shall be due and payable at the following Toll Plazas for the distance specified for such Toll Plaza(s): Location of Toll Plaza(s)(chainage) Length (in km.) for which Fee is payable Km/Ch. 370.420 (Near Dighal village in Jhajjar district) 38.280 Km/Ch. 430.000 (Near Gangaycha Jatt village in Rewari district) 32.922 (excluding 12.453 km. long Rewari Bypass) [F. No. NHAI/13013/658/11-12/CO/GC Rohtak (Rohtak-Bawal) BOT] ALKESH SHARMA, Jt. Secy. Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
